prompt: A vast luminous web of interconnected spheres suspended in deep space. Each sphere glows softly and is connected by threads of light to several neighbours. From any single sphere you focus on, its neighbours are always visibly larger and more densely connected — more threads, brighter glow. This pattern repeats at every node, no matter which one you look at. No sphere ever appears as the most connected when viewed from itself. The composition feels simultaneously centred and off-centre, stable and quietly wrong. Hyper-detailed, surreal, no text, no labels, no numbers, dark background, photorealistic render.
visual_logic: Every node is surrounded by neighbours that appear more connected and prominent than itself, repeating everywhere, creating the sense that others are always more central, reflecting the paradox that your friends have more friends than you.
